array_of_company_records_to_enrich_bulk: Array of company records to enrich (bulk)
array_of_person_records_to_enrich_bulk: Array of person records to enrich (bulk)
date_of_the_next_quota_renewal: Date of the next quota renewal
days_until_the_next_quota_renewal: Days until the next quota renewal
e_g_eva_kiegler_alternative_to_first_las: e.g., Eva Kiegler (alternative to first/last name)
enrich_a_company_from_its_website_or_lin: Enrich a company from its website or LinkedIn URL to get Prospeo firmographics.
enrich_a_list_of_people_or_companies_in: Enrich a list of people or companies in batches with Prospeo bulk enrichment.
enrich_and_search_b2b_contacts_and_compa: Enrich and search B2B contacts and companies
find_and_verify_a_prospect_s_work_email: Find and verify a prospect's work email and optional mobile number with Prospeo.
find_verified_work_emails_and_mobile_num: Find verified work emails and mobile numbers, enrich person and company profiles, and search a B2B database of leads and companies using 20+ filters.
identifiers_that_did_not_match_bulk_enri: Identifiers that did not match (bulk enrich)
identifiers_that_failed_minimum_match_re: Identifiers that failed minimum match requirements (bulk enrich)
only_records_with_a_mobile_bulk_enrich_p: Only records with a mobile (bulk enrich person)
only_records_with_a_mobile_enrich_person: Only records with a mobile (enrich person)
prospeo_company_id_from_a_previous_enric: Prospeo company_id from a previous enrichment
prospeo_person_id_from_a_previous_search: Prospeo person_id from a previous Search Person
search_prospeo_for_people_matching_an_ic: Search Prospeo for people matching an ICP using seniority, title, industry, and company filters.
true_if_the_search_was_free_due_to: True if the search was free due to 30-day deduplication
true_if_this_enrichment_was_free: True if this enrichment was free
